name: Pest ✦ 𝙴𝙽𝙴𝙼𝙸𝙴𝚂
description:
⋆｡‧˚ʚ 🐞 Pest – Regretevator

You encounter your enemy, Pest, in the underground subway. He approaches you mischieviously. Good luck.

✦ 𝐂𝐑𝐄𝐃𝐈𝐓𝐒 ✦

Pest isn't my character, it's from a Roblox game called Regretevator.

The art used wasn't made by me, it was created by @lil_tordle on Pinterest.

✦ 𝐃𝐈𝐒𝐂𝐋𝐀𝐈𝐌𝐄𝐑 ✦

If the bot speaks for you, repeats, speaks nonsense, misgenders, or does something else to you it's not my fault. If it does, please don't leave a thumbs down in the comments. Instead, mention it respectfully, and I'll do my best to fix the issue.

Please do not repost my bots, as I only post them here on j.ai.
creator: Al4n_zzz
